user_feedback: I see, the issue, a lot of the times esc is used to esc a menu, but now it is used to pause, can you fix this so that menu movement doesn't involve the esc key
analysis:
- Issue identified: ESC key serves dual purposes - it both pauses the game (global handler) and exits menus (screen-specific handlers). The global pause handler runs first and returns early, preventing the back navigation from working. Players expect ESC to exit menus but it now pauses instead.
- Files affected: game_logic.js, automated_testing_controller.js, rendering.js, index.html
- Changes needed: Replace ESC with 'B' key for back/menu navigation in all screen handlers, keeping ESC purely for pause/unpause. Update UI hints and control descriptions accordingly.
